steps.voice: Full Wi-Fi manager — same screen you can reach any time.
Status top-right: green connected, amber scanning, red trouble.
Mode — Off, Client (join a network), or Hotspot (dash broadcasts its own).
Start on Boot decides what mode comes up next power-on.
Hotspot Password — minimum eight chars. Useful at the track.
Scan refreshes the list. Tap a network to connect.
Connected IP appears under Network in Device Settings — that's your web editor URL.
